conclusion.summary: HIXL repository verification completed successfully. The main build process completed without errors and generated the cann-hixl_9.1.0_linux-x86_64.run installer package. The build environment setup was straightforward using the user-provided CANN build image. Documentation was found to be comprehensive and accurate.
key_findings: Build system works correctly with the provided CANN image
All build dependencies are satisfied in the image
cmake 3.28.2, gcc/g++ 13.3.0, python 3.10.2 all meet version requirements
Build completed in 276 seconds with -j9 (60% of 16 cores)
Examples directory is well-structured with comprehensive C++ and Python examples
Test system is functional (build started successfully)
recommendations: Continue using the provided CANN build image for development and CI
For complete test verification, run on a system with Ascend NPUs available
The build.sh script is well-designed for parallel builds, recommend using -j with appropriate core count
